notes: Initial release with speed display, radar scanning animation, auto-dim, deep sleep
Auto-detect EUC World / Nosfet protocol, PWM display mode, configurable BLE name via web serial
Configurable protocol mapping (Auto / EUC World / Nosfet), trip distance tracking for Nosfet
Fix Nosfet speed scale, trip distance, PWM readout, frame validation, median speed filter
Screen flip 180° option, Gotway/Begode and Kingsong mappings, removed mock data
PWM and battery % for all protocols: Gotway (67/84/100V curves), Kingsong (67/84/100/126V), Nosfet 84V models
Inmotion support: Classic (FFE0) and V2 (Nordic UART) variants for V11/V12/V13/S1 — speed, PWM, battery %, temperature
